name: Halftusk
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Guardian Champion
factionTrait.text: A guardian moves the turn token +1 step when they have their banner on an objective hex during the end phase.

uniqueTraits.name: Fighting Fit
uniqueTraits.text: If Halftusk does not have any wounds, his skills have +2 {accuracy}.

ultimate.name: The Great Tusk
ultimate.text: Plot phase only. Halftusk may make a claim action. Then choose {protection_boon} or {move_boon}. Friendly models within range gain the boon you chose.

plotSkills.name: Regenerate
plotSkills.text: Remove up to 2 of Halftusk's wounds.

clashSkills.name: Regenerate
clashSkills.text: Remove up to 2 of Halftusk's wounds.

clashSkills.name: One Punch
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Halftusk may use Two Punch this turn as a bonus action.

clashSkills.name: Two Punch
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Halftusk may move up to 1 hex.

plotSkills.name: Feel the Power
plotSkills.text: This skill may be used only while on an objective hex. Gain {dodge_boon} and {protection_boon}.

plotSkills.name: Hop
plotSkills.text: You may place each Froglodyte in a hex up to 2 hexes from its current hex.

clashSkills.name: Tongue Tow
clashSkills.text: Move a friendly banner that is within range up to 1 hex toward this Froglodyte.

clashSkills.name: Tongue Lash
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move target up to 1 hex toward this Froglodyte.
